Uses of Enum Class
org.jline.utils.InfoCmp.Capability

Packages that use InfoCmp.Capability
Package
Description
org.jline.keymap
JLine 3 Keymap Package - Components for handling keyboard input and key bindings.
org.jline.terminal
JLine Terminal API - Core abstractions for terminal operations across different platforms.
org.jline.terminal.impl
JLine Terminal implementation classes.
org.jline.utils
JLine utility classes.

  • Uses of InfoCmp.Capability in org.jline.keymap

    Methods in org.jline.keymap with parameters of type InfoCmp.Capability
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static String
    KeyMap.key(Terminal terminal, InfoCmp.Capability capability)
    Returns the escape sequence for a terminal capability.

  • Uses of InfoCmp.Capability in org.jline.terminal

    Methods in org.jline.terminal with parameters of type InfoCmp.Capability
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    Terminal.getBooleanCapability(InfoCmp.Capability capability)
    Returns whether the terminal supports the specified boolean capability.
    Integer
    Terminal.getNumericCapability(InfoCmp.Capability capability)
    Returns the value of the specified numeric capability for this terminal.
    String
    Terminal.getStringCapability(InfoCmp.Capability capability)
    Returns the string value of the specified capability for this terminal.
    boolean
    Terminal.puts(InfoCmp.Capability capability, Object... params)
    Outputs a terminal control string for the specified capability.
